tasks.name: obsidian-daily-summary
prompt: Review this Obsidian vault for notes updated today ({date}).
Ignore the .obsidian directory, plugin files, cache files, images, and attachments unless a Markdown note explicitly references them.
Create or update a Chinese Markdown summary at raw/_Daily-Summaries/obsidian-summary-{date}.md.
Include: updated note list, key changes, new ideas, open questions, possible follow-up tasks, and links to the original notes using relative Markdown links.
If no notes were updated today, write a short summary saying no Markdown notes changed today.

tasks.name: example-local-note-task
prompt: Write outputs in Chinese unless the user asks otherwise.
